text.title: AI Plugin Ecosystem (Figma) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces this contract before the artefact is accepted.

example.code: { "adr_id": "ai-plugin-ecosystem-001", "title": "Sample ADR", "status": "accepted", "context": "Why this decision was needed and what trade-offs we faced.", "decision": "What we chose and why.", "consequences": ["positive", "negative"], "signers": ["lead@example.com"], "decided_at": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: Missing required fields per the schema above.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Auto-populate timestamps from the validation moment.
Normalise enum casing to schema lowercase.
